# Secrets / personal data that must never be committed.
# One extended-regex (grep -E) per line. '#' lines are comments.

# Private keys
-----BEGIN (RSA |EC |OPENSSH |PGP )?PRIVATE KEY-----

# AWS access key IDs
AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}

# Generic API/secret assignments with a real-looking value
(api[_-]?key|secret|token|password)["' ]*[:=]["' ]*[A-Za-z0-9/+_-]{20,}

# OpenAI / Anthropic style keys
sk-[A-Za-z0-9]{20,}

# Personal email of the maintainer (use a placeholder in docs instead)
tomtombrower555@gmail\.com
